message:
feat: v2.7.24 - Add local semantic search with transformers.js

- Updated to agentic-flow@1.8.7 with local embeddings and WASM fix
- Added @xenova/transformers@^3.2.0 as optional dependency
- Enables offline semantic search (no API keys required)
- Uses Xenova/all-MiniLM-L6-v2 model (384 dimensions, ~23MB)
- 50-100ms embedding generation with LRU caching
- Falls back gracefully to database search if model unavailable
- Memory system now shows 'Embeddings: local' instead of 'claude'
- Package size reduced from 166.9 MB to 1.6 MB in agentic-flow

+VERSION="2.7.24"
